creator: el.mofo@uol.com.br
text:
My system uses the VIA VT8237A chipset. Currently one SATA drive is attached.

My RELENG_6_1 installation works fine. The hard drive is healthly and tested.

After updating to RELENG_6 (10/26/2006), the system hangs on the boot process,
with the following errors:
	ad4: error issuing READ_DMA command
	ad4: timeout waiting to issue command
	ad4: error issuing WRITE_DMA command
	ad4: timeout waiting to issue command

My hard drive:
	ad4: 76319MB <SAMSUNG HD080HJ/P ZH100-41>

How-To-Repeat: Update to RELENG_6 on a machine that uses the VIA VT8237A chipset;
compile and install the new kernel.
